questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The s-Block elements are located in the first two groups of the periodic table.

opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The elements of s-Block are less electropositive than the elements of Alkali metals.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
